text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the Kikuka Sho, I speak to Ines Fujin's
mother on the phone.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
My twins are both saying that they want to attend
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I need to visit the hospital, and I've asked my
husband to accompany me. It really shames me
that we can't be there for our daughters...

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I want the three of them to get together again
and talk. Could I ask you to help out, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry for involving you in our family
affairs...
choice_data_list: It's fine. I'm happy to do what I can for Ines.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much. Please take good care of my
daughters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging from Ines Fujin's behavior and the way
her conversations with her sisters have gone up
until now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems they're a little at odds with each other.
Having me there as a third party might help ease
the tension.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But first, Ines Fujin and I have to decide if she'll
actually be racing in the Arima Kinen or just
spectating. Later, on the day of the race...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh... you're both here.

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text:
You're running in the Arima Kinen too, right?
Good luck! I know you're gonna crush 'em!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...I'm sorry. I haven't kept any of the promises I
made to you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I still haven't made enough money for you to hire
a helper for a year, and I made you both worry at
the Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text: You don't have to apologize. Me and Cassie—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But listen! I promise I'll pull through! Don't worry
about helping out around the house or anything
like that!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
...We're going to. We're going to help out. We
know all about how to do the laundry now.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Cassie...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Why?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You're doing too much. You both have dreams of
your own, don't you? You don't have to try and—

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
That's not it! We made up our minds. It's OUR
decision! We're going to stop dancing and help
Mom!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: No... you didn't make that decision—you were forced to make it! By me! I gave you no choice!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: Why can't you just—
choice_data_list: Maybe you are forcing a decision onto them—but not in the way you think.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
They want to be able to focus on dance practice
every day, and go on to win competitions, and...

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: ...You're wrong.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
Me and Polly... we just like seeing the whole
family smile.

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
That's why we like dancing. When we dance,
everyone watches us with big smiles on their
faces. But...

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text:
What we like even more than that is watching you
race with all you've got!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text:
We want to see you run a whole lot, and smile a
whole lot, and win a whole lot...

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text: That's this whole family's dream right now!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You guys...

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin, it's almost time for you to enter the
paddock!
choice_data_list: Ines, did you hear what your sisters said?
Ines, did you hear what your sisters said?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Then... then what is it?
choice_data_list: It's their dream... and mine too.
It's their dream... and mine too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not just the stands that are packed for today's
Arima Kinen—the paddock's drawn a full crowd
too.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, basically, everyone's come 'cause they
wanna see Oguri's last race.

text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know. I mean, Oguri's, like, a super
amazing runner, right? Is that it?

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Well, thing is, she hasn't really been in top form
lately. Rumor has it this could be her last run ever.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oguri! You can do it! I believe in you! You can
win!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan B
text_block_list.text: Please, Ogurin! Give it all you've got and win!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, people are saying this runner called Mejiro
Ryan—who's, like, one of Ines's rivals—might
actually, like, win.

text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text:
...Whoa. You know, like, so much about this
racing stuff lately.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah. I mean, Ines's races are way more fun
if you know the whole deal.

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey girls! I wasn't expecting to see you two
here at the Arima.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
B-Boss! Wh-what about the store? Don't tell me
it's closed?!

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Uh, I do employ a lot of part-timers, y'know?
Besides, one day off is no big deal... Wait,
look—she's coming!

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Some days I just feel like coming out and seeing
Ines run—watching her really boosts my spirits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!
